overview: E Tao Integrative Medicine offers personalized holistic care combining Functional Medicine, Naturopathic Medicine, and Oriental Medicine. Led by Dr. Lily Jei-ho Chang, the clinic addresses root causes of illness through integrative practices including acupuncture, herbal medicine, and advanced therapies.
highlights: Specialized in chronic pain, neurological disorders, and complex chronic illness
NAET allergy therapy and far infrared sauna detox programs
targetAudience: Patients seeking treatment for chronic pain, neurological conditions, autoimmune diseases, and complex chronic illnesses.
